intro: Werauhia monstrum, also known as the 'Monstroid Bromeliad', is a rare and unique species of epiphytic bromeliad native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The bioactive constituents of Werauhia monstrum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
